title: Standard Chartered appoints Adu as Country Head of Corporate Affairs, Brand and Marketing, Nigeria - FinancialEDGE
description: Standard Chartered Bank Nigeria Limited has announced the appointment of Joke Adu as its Head of Corporate Affairs, Brand and Marketing in its Nigeria franchise. Joke joined Standard Chartered in 2007 and has held various senior roles with in the Banking Nigeria spanning Customer Service / Client Experience, General Management, Project Management, Sustainability, Governance, Marketing
html:
Standard Chartered Bank Nigeria Limited has announced the appointment of Joke Adu as its Head of Corporate Affairs, Brand and Marketing in its Nigeria franchise.

Joke joined Standard Chartered in 2007 and has held various senior roles with in the Banking Nigeria spanning Customer Service / Client Experience, General Management, Project Management, Sustainability, Governance, Marketing Communications and Brand Management.
